_note: Human/LLM-curated triage annotations keyed by feature-request id. Regenerating the doc (generate.py) merges these with live API data. When new requests appear, add entries here; entries for ids no longer active are ignored. Categories: quick_win | easy | full_feature | probably_not. Scope: website | api | mobile | bot. Optional `prs`: list of open PR refs like "police-cad-api#138" — renders a '🔀 In Progress (open PRs)' section + inline badge, and drops the item from 'Suggested next up'. Remove the ref once merged.

6a4da63764527e6069820926.rationale: A court-scoped 'DOJ Portal' / Attorney Access role so District/Defense Attorneys can view and participate in court cases WITHOUT full Judicial edit rights (which today risk accidental or intentional changes to court records). Leans on the existing community permission model (userHasCommunityPermission / roles); the net-new is a distinct role + a read/participate court surface. Split from the shipped 'Automatic Sentencing Calculation'; part of the DOJ-permissions cluster.
6a4da63764527e6069820926.risks_or_deps: Design a court-scoped role distinct from Judicial (read/participate, not edit records); reuse the permission model + authorizeCommunityAction.
6a4da63764527e6069820926.possible_duplicate: Courts Department Update (attorney role); Automatic Sentencing Calculation (parent, shipped)

6a4da63764527e6069820927.rationale: Plea-deal + prosecutor workflow building on the shipped per-charge disposition + Final Judgment system: a prosecutor proposes a plea (reduced/amended charges + agreed fine/jail), the defendant/defense accepts or rejects, and the judge finalizes, with totals auto-updating from the agreed charges. The sentencing math already exists; the net-new is the negotiation state machine + roles. Split from the shipped 'Sentencing Calculator and Plea Deal System'.
6a4da63764527e6069820927.risks_or_deps: Negotiation/state model + prosecutor & defense roles; overlaps the court cluster. Pairs with the DOJ Portal role.
6a4da63764527e6069820927.possible_duplicate: Court Improvement Suggestion; Courts Department Update; DOJ Portal / Attorney Access Role

6a4c3ab0e948c039f9ca138a.rationale: Two asks. (1) Auto-sentencing calculator with per-charge Upheld/Dismissed/Reduced/Amended and live-updating totals — SHIPPED (arrest fine+time calc + court sentencing with per-charge dispositions & Final Judgment totals across api/web/mobile). (2) Net-new: a separate 'DOJ Portal' / 'Attorney Access' role so District/Defense Attorneys can work court cases WITHOUT full Judicial edit permissions, which today risk accidental or intentional changes to court records. Scoped role + portal leaning on the existing permission model. Mark the site request released once satisfied; the DOJ-portal remainder is the real open work.
6a4c3ab0e948c039f9ca138a.risks_or_deps: Design a court-scoped attorney role distinct from Judicial (read/participate, not edit records); part of the DOJ-permissions cluster.
6a4c3ab0e948c039f9ca138a.possible_duplicate: Sentencing Calculator and Plea Deal System; Arrest Fine and Time Calculation (both = the calculator, shipped); Courts Department Update (attorney role)

6a4c35e0e948c039f9ca11b2.rationale: A fuller restatement of the existing 'Self Dispatch and Call Attachment Suggestion' (same requester): authorized LEO/Fire/EMS create/attach/close/edit their own calls when no dispatcher is online, see assigned units, and get a PER-UNIT tone when attached (not a dept-wide sound). Calls + unit assignment already exist, so it extends them with permissioned self-service + a targeted attach notification. Consolidate with the original into one self-dispatch project rather than tracking twice.
6a4c35e0e948c039f9ca11b2.risks_or_deps: Per-unit (not dept-wide) attach tone; per-department permission toggle; extend to Fire/EMS dashboards.
6a4c35e0e948c039f9ca11b2.possible_duplicate: Self Dispatch and Call Attachment Suggestion; Audio Notifications for 911... (attach tone); Update to fire and EMS

6a4a242d40e035ad466bffdf.rationale: A read-only penal-code reference for officers (and optionally civilians) — a place to read the FULL code without the current truncation. penalCodes already live on the community and are fetched for citations/forms, so this is a display surface (a scrollable/searchable list near the police dashboard quick actions), not new data or plumbing. The requester explicitly wants read-only access WITHOUT granting Judicial (edit) access, so it's purely additive with no permission risk.
6a4a242d40e035ad466bffdf.risks_or_deps: Show full text (no '...' truncation) with scroll/search for long codes; gate civilian visibility behind a per-community toggle (some want CIVs to read it, some not).

6a13d4bf07d208ef76c64182.rationale: Highest-voted request (46). The custom-items + shop + inventory core aligns with the economy/inventory system staff already said is planned. But the full FiveM scope (looting, crafting, hunger/thirst) is a big lane change for a CAD — a commenter even said 'this is a cad system not a fivem addon'. Recommend carving an MVP: custom items + shops + inventory tied to the existing economy, and defer hunger/crafting/looting.
6a13d4bf07d208ef76c64182.risks_or_deps: Scope creep; pay-to-win concerns raised in comments; depends on economy system (already shipped).
6a13d4bf07d208ef76c64182.possible_duplicate: Custom Civilian Jobs + Buyable Items; Job system; Department Overhaul

69a90489f5524b2c4aa0834b.rationale: ER:LC PRC API can supply live player lists, callsigns, locations, join/leave logs and some in-game commands — enabling live unit tracking, duty logging and CAD-to-game announcements. No RP data (civilians/warrants) is exposed, so it's about bringing live game state in, not syncing records. Staff already publicly deferred pending stronger demand; requester notes plates + emergency calls were recently added to the API.
69a90489f5524b2c4aa0834b.risks_or_deps: Poll-based external API needs background services/infra; gauge demand before committing. Phase as MVP (status/players/commands) → live map.
69a90489f5524b2c4aa0834b.possible_duplicate: A FiveM Addon for the cad/ticket system

6a3d4781bd5933e6c9b8badf.rationale: Adds a richer, realistic ticket/citation format with extra fields (e.g. phone number for follow-ups) that carry into court. Citations already exist; this extends the citation model + issue forms across surfaces. Solid votes (9) for a moderate change.
6a3d4781bd5933e6c9b8badf.risks_or_deps: Coordinate field changes with the court/case view so judges see the added info.

69d32a709c76e1ecb185684a.rationale: Sync Discord roles → CAD community roles on join. Discord OAuth linking exists but only with 'identify' scope; needs expanded scope (guilds/roles), a community↔guild mapping, a Discord-role→CAD-role mapping table, and auto-enroll logic. Staff flagged a caveat: syncing roles still requires re-adding members + setting permissions.
69d32a709c76e1ecb185684a.risks_or_deps: OAuth scope expansion; new mapping config UI; permission edge cases.

69aca7d24794df4f176b596d.rationale: Link civilian profiles for relationships (spouse, family). Contained: a relationship reference on the civilian model plus UI to set/display it. Positive reception incl. staff ('cool concept'); 9 votes, 4 comments of agreement.

69e5345eac5d3728a866664b.rationale: Body cams. Staff already explained the core blocker: consoles can't be captured externally, and the referenced demo relies on Roblox screen-share on PC. Only viable for PC/FiveM communities, so functionality is inherently limited. Not a fit as a general feature.
69e5345eac5d3728a866664b.risks_or_deps: Platform capture limitations are external and not solvable by us.

69c43fbf12dc46d46229c7b4.rationale: DMV/firearm approval workflow: approve/deny vehicle registrations, emissions tests, and firearm applications, with a chat to arrange appointments. Confirmed no approval state exists today for vehicles or firearms (only civilians have approvalStatus) — so this adds a new approval lifecycle + a coordination chat. 7 votes.
69c43fbf12dc46d46229c7b4.risks_or_deps: New approval state machine + notifications; chat overlaps the general chat request.
69c43fbf12dc46d46229c7b4.possible_duplicate: Courts Department Update (DMV part); Department Overhaul (licensing)

6a1a90926f9bc001b6b14c03.rationale: Per-department voice chat. Same reasoning staff gave on the 'Radio' request: TeamSpeak/Discord already do voice exceptionally well, and building/operating a voice platform across web+mobile+bot is a large infra commitment that doesn't fit the quality bar.
6a1a90926f9bc001b6b14c03.possible_duplicate: Radio; being able to have a radio to talk to others

69bf9b5d958f9461cde39144.rationale: PTT radio with lockable channels. Staff explicitly declined this: existing platforms (TeamSpeak/Discord) do voice better and the technical overhead across all surfaces is significant. Documented product decision.
69bf9b5d958f9461cde39144.possible_duplicate: Chat Radios; being able to have a radio to talk to others

69be758f47807d968f18c9c8.rationale: Pay fines via UnbelievaBoat. Staff were positive originally, but LPC now has its own economy + inbox/fines + /pay-fine, which reduces the need. Still useful only for communities standardized on UnbelievaBoat's Discord economy; would be an external API integration hung off fine payment.
69be758f47807d968f18c9c8.risks_or_deps: Own economy now shipped lowers priority; external API auth/rate limits.

69ca8b7ba4263bca6d1ebd72.rationale: Multi-select units on the dispatch dashboard to set one status for all (e.g. bulk offline). No batch endpoint exists today (each status change is a single PUT); adds roster checkboxes + a batch tenCode endpoint (~half a day). Requested by staff; the new dispatch dashboard already has the roster/filter scaffolding.
69ca8b7ba4263bca6d1ebd72.risks_or_deps: Emit per-unit socket broadcasts for each updated unit.

69a8879367bba4188404c58f.rationale: Toggle to let police view medical history on servers without EMS/Fire. Staff framed it as a configurable, per-department component under the planned Custom Departments work. Medical history already exists (EMS); this is a permission/visibility toggle + surfacing it to police.
69a8879367bba4188404c58f.risks_or_deps: Ties into Custom Departments plan; privacy toggle default off.

6a29d46a69d1034101c666a0.rationale: Owner ability to add/remove money from player accounts. The economy + wallet + transaction ledger already exist, so this is an admin balance-adjust action + a small UI, with a ledger entry for auditability. Clear owner demand (appears twice).
6a29d46a69d1034101c666a0.risks_or_deps: Write an audit/ledger entry so manual adjustments are traceable.
6a29d46a69d1034101c666a0.possible_duplicate: being able to make how much money is in someones account

6a27ff9ef89712e483ac3cb3.rationale: Sentencing calculator + plea-deal system for court. The calculator (auto-sum jail time/fines from charges, concurrent/consecutive, summary) is a strong, mostly self-contained MVP since penalCode amounts already exist. The plea-deal/prosecutor workflow is the larger second phase.
6a27ff9ef89712e483ac3cb3.risks_or_deps: Split: ship the calculator first, then plea deals.
6a27ff9ef89712e483ac3cb3.possible_duplicate: Arrest Fine and Time Calculation (calculator); Court Improvement Suggestion

6a25cd1632be3f84fb9faed1.rationale: Custom civilian jobs/companies separate from departments, with their own pay and shops — a natural extension now that the economy exists. Overlaps heavily with two other requests; worth consolidating into one 'civilian economy/jobs' project.
6a25cd1632be3f84fb9faed1.risks_or_deps: Consolidate with the items/jobs cluster before building.
6a25cd1632be3f84fb9faed1.possible_duplicate: Custom Civilian Jobs + Buyable Items; Department Overhaul; Items, custom looting and crafting

6a1f576205070584e6da746e.rationale: Custom civilian jobs with pay rates + buyable custom items with an inventory and Discord /buy. Directly extends the shipped economy and the bot's economy commands. Near-duplicate of 'Job system' and overlaps the top items request.
6a1f576205070584e6da746e.risks_or_deps: Needs an item/inventory model (shared with the Items request).
6a1f576205070584e6da746e.possible_duplicate: Job system; Items, custom looting and crafting; Department Overhaul

6a182462c10fe9084bebc99a.rationale: Road names on the map. Maps are static community-uploaded images (no vector/tile layer), so real road labeling would need either a vector-map refactor or manual per-map overlays. Simplest path is a community workaround: upload a map image that already includes street names. Low effort-to-value as a platform feature.
6a182462c10fe9084bebc99a.risks_or_deps: Static-image map architecture; per-game-map street data unavailable.

69dfdb973077f4083243d50f.rationale: Alert sounds on the mobile dashboards. expo-av is already integrated and mobile already plays panic + signal-100 sounds; the gap is sounds for new calls/BOLOs/dispatch tones. Reuses the established pattern, so relatively cheap. Anchors the broader audio cluster.
69dfdb973077f4083243d50f.risks_or_deps: Respect a user volume/mute setting; avoid overlapping playback.
69dfdb973077f4083243d50f.possible_duplicate: Audio Notifications for 911...; Dispatch 911 Call Tone; Warrant Screaming system

69b67ab11056a7b7299c92f3.rationale: Restrict weapon-license create/edit/remove to a special 'staff' department (toggleable), so civilians can't self-issue firearm licenses, plus a police 'gun taken' flag. Permissions model exists; this adds a license-permission gate + a field. Fits the Custom Departments direction.
69b67ab11056a7b7299c92f3.risks_or_deps: Overlaps license-permission and DMV requests; unify the permission model.
69b67ab11056a7b7299c92f3.possible_duplicate: Restrict who can suspend or revoke licenses; Department Overhaul

69b433b6e0ccd21fa051d877.rationale: Auto-assign a default image to registered vehicles/firearms by keyword match (e.g. 'Karin Sultan'). Nice quality touch but requires building + hosting a curated keyword→image library (licensing/quality caveats). Modest demand.
69b433b6e0ccd21fa051d877.risks_or_deps: Image sourcing/licensing; maintenance of the mapping.

69ae33420f55723212486bde.rationale: Courts add-on: civilian-vs-civilian lawsuits, a records-request workflow, and DMV license approve/deny/revoke (toggleable). Staff acknowledged it as an add-on to the existing court system. Overlaps the DMV and other court requests — consolidate.
69ae33420f55723212486bde.risks_or_deps: Large court surface; unify with the court cluster.
69ae33420f55723212486bde.possible_duplicate: DMV, guns; Court Improvement Suggestion; Sentencing Calculator and Plea Deal System

69a888ee4725bb15abdc132d.rationale: A FiveM resource that pushes tickets/CAD data into the game. Feasible via the existing API, but it's a new client surface (Lua resource) to build and maintain. Similar spirit to the ER:LC parity ask; gauge demand across FiveM communities first.
69a888ee4725bb15abdc132d.risks_or_deps: New maintenance surface; ongoing FiveM/game-version support.
69a888ee4725bb15abdc132d.possible_duplicate: Parity with Emergency Response Liberty County

6a3d7bab5f546057cdcb5e0b.rationale: Admin-customizable insurance-company list, selectable when registering a vehicle — modeled on the existing penal-code config pattern, so tractable. Contained (config list + a vehicle field). Low demand (3 votes), hence cheap-but-not-urgent.

6a2f29cc1f6a7404d19e146a.rationale: Sub-divisions within departments (Detective Bureau, SWAT, etc.) with divisional ranks. This is a structural change to the department/rank model and all the surfaces that render ranks. Real value for larger servers but not small.

6a26a6569bde5da5f0e17848.rationale: Auto-calculate total fine + jail time when charges are added to an arrest, and store the totals on the record. penalCode amounts already exist, so this is summation + display + persistence — removes a real, repeated manual pain point. Effectively the MVP of the sentencing-calculator request.
6a26a6569bde5da5f0e17848.risks_or_deps: Handle concurrent vs consecutive time (align with sentencing request).
6a26a6569bde5da5f0e17848.possible_duplicate: Sentencing Calculator and Plea Deal System

6a179ef5a5d3130925b94448.rationale: Bring Fire/EMS dashboards to parity with the police dashboard, including sending tones/panic. EMS dashboard and LEO/FD/EMS tones already exist on the website, so this is closing parity gaps rather than net-new plumbing. Overlaps the audio cluster.

6a11249046e73d2248545e0c.rationale: Shift tracking with time-based quotas, shift history, and supervisor oversight/reports. Basic clock-in/clock-out already exists (economy), so the net-new value is quotas + reporting + supervisor permissions. Requester suggests a simple clock in/out button per department.
6a11249046e73d2248545e0c.risks_or_deps: Roblox auto-clock integration likely out of scope; manual is the realistic path.

69f97d85e5da87ac3ad736f2.rationale: Play a sound/alert when a looked-up person has an active warrant. Sound infra already exists; this is a small wiring job on the search/lookup result. Cheap, adds a safety/immersion cue. Part of the audio cluster.
69f97d85e5da87ac3ad736f2.risks_or_deps: Reuse existing alert-sound manager; make it toggleable.

69f04fb3581225bb45cc8f29.rationale: Restrict who can suspend/revoke driver/firearm licenses (e.g. judges/DOJ), with audit log + notification, to stop RP abuse. The permission model and audit-log infra already exist, so this is adding a specific permission gate + wiring notifications. Overlaps other permission/license requests.
69f04fb3581225bb45cc8f29.risks_or_deps: Unify with weapon-license and DMV permission asks.

69ed0b3d242caad0f7b47223.rationale: Full training academy + career progression: courses/checklists, certifications, promotion pathways, evaluations, transfers, and a career-timeline dashboard. Large multi-entity system. Ranks + promotion metrics partially exist, but this is a major build best suited to large servers.
69ed0b3d242caad0f7b47223.risks_or_deps: Very large; would need phasing (certifications → pathways → evaluations).

69d450ff198e246ac867f728.rationale: A cross-department chat with images and a live feed. Real-time socket infra and a court-chat model already exist as a pattern, but a general chat needs rooms, moderation, history, and images across surfaces. Overlaps the DMV/appointment chat and the (declined) voice requests — text chat is the viable slice.
69d450ff198e246ac867f728.risks_or_deps: Moderation + abuse handling; storage of images/history.

6a4252fc2ad13be0912d943e.rationale: Give tickets a pay window (server-configurable) that turns into a warrant if unpaid, plus a paid/unpaid flag. The inbox/fines system already has due dates (dueAt), delinquent status, and contest-extension days, and a scheduler already flips fines delinquent (api/scheduler/economy_jobs.go) — so the net-new is auto-consequence generation + config. DNYGUNZ (2026-07-07) asks for this generalized to real-world failure-to-respond actions: failure to answer a ticket → license suspension/revocation, failure to pay → warrant, and for ARRESTS a failure-to-appear → automatic warrant. Widen from citations-only to arrests and add license-suspend as an outcome. Infra is mostly there.
6a4252fc2ad13be0912d943e.risks_or_deps: Needs a scheduler/cron to flip unpaid/no-response → warrant/suspension (project historically lacks expiry crons; reuse the economy_jobs delinquent job). Coordinate license-suspend with the existing license model + wire Discord cron alerts.
6a4252fc2ad13be0912d943e.possible_duplicate: Automatic case progression (failure-to-respond); Requesting the ability to restrict who can suspend or revoke licenses (license-suspend outcome)

6a408470a8212db5c3869f9a.rationale: Set a player's account balance from server settings. Duplicate of 'Send more money to players'; economy + ledger exist, so it's a small admin balance-set action. Fold into that one.
6a408470a8212db5c3869f9a.risks_or_deps: Write a ledger entry for the manual set.

6a090eb09687cfca58d7fec8.rationale: Import/duplicate a character (with vehicles, firearms, etc.) from one community into another. Contained but non-trivial: deep-copy of civilian + linked assets with fresh IDs and ownership. Requester clarified the flow in a comment. Modest demand (2 votes).
6a090eb09687cfca58d7fec8.risks_or_deps: ID remapping; avoid cross-community data leakage.

69f65e091a6d8daf7d4b058f.rationale: Broad court overhaul: arrest plea flow (like citations), lawyer/attorney integration, civilian-vs-civilian lawsuits, and form-based legal documents (motions, subpoenas, evidence). A large legal-ecosystem build. Strong overlap with the other court requests — anchor a consolidated court roadmap.
69f65e091a6d8daf7d4b058f.risks_or_deps: Consolidate the entire court cluster into one phased plan.
69f65e091a6d8daf7d4b058f.possible_duplicate: Sentencing Calculator; Courts Department Update; Automatic case progression

6a4085ea449dcf2c86523949.rationale: In-app voice radio with channels 1–100 and a panic button. Same voice-infra reasoning staff used to decline the other radio requests. The panic sub-feature already exists via the panic button.

6a2843110360fd95354ea630.rationale: Expand the Discord bot with RP action commands (/arrest, /fine, /inventory, /pay, /buy, /sell, /give, /use, etc.) so actions are logged in chat. Some already exist (/search, /send-money, /pay-fine, /contest-fine); the RP/inventory ones depend on the items/economy system. Fits the 'bot as a first-class surface' direction.
6a2843110360fd95354ea630.risks_or_deps: Inventory commands blocked on an item/inventory model.
6a2843110360fd95354ea630.possible_duplicate: Items, custom looting and crafting; Custom Civilian Jobs + Buyable Items

6a24dfeb32be3f84fb9f9101.rationale: Self-dispatch: authorized responders create their own calls, attach/detach units, update statuses, and get a per-unit tone when attached. The calls system + unit assignment already exist, so this extends them with permissioned self-service + a targeted attach notification. Realistic value for communities without dedicated dispatchers.
6a24dfeb32be3f84fb9f9101.risks_or_deps: Per-unit (not dept-wide) notification; permission toggle per department.

6a245af773dee9cc7d183cc2.rationale: A sprawling department grab-bag: per-rank wages, manager-role join approvals, paid licensing/applications, political/banking departments, an in-CAD shop, department cloning, and application questionnaires. Most sub-ideas duplicate other requests. Two nuggets are cheap and worth extracting now: 'clone a department' and 'manager role can approve joins without full admin'.
6a245af773dee9cc7d183cc2.risks_or_deps: Split into discrete features; don't build as one epic.
6a245af773dee9cc7d183cc2.possible_duplicate: Job system; Custom Civilian Jobs + Buyable Items; Items; Department Divisions

6a22ceb8e3d6d8b3c13e77b0.rationale: Audio for new 911 calls, per-officer attach alerts, and a TTS panic that repeats the officer's callsign. The 911-tone and attach-alert parts are quick wins on existing sound + socket infra; the TTS callsign is the net-new piece. Central to the audio cluster — build these together.
6a22ceb8e3d6d8b3c13e77b0.risks_or_deps: TTS engine choice (client Web Speech vs generated audio).
6a22ceb8e3d6d8b3c13e77b0.possible_duplicate: Dispatch 911 Call Tone; Mobile Sound; Self Dispatch and Call Attachment

6a1d6a454168560115580943.rationale: A booking/jail process: mugshot photo, intake info, jail duration, injury/status notes, and showing the last mugshot on lookup. Arrest records exist; this adds a booking sub-record + image upload + lookup surfacing. Low demand (1 vote) but a coherent RP feature.
6a1d6a454168560115580943.risks_or_deps: Image storage; ties into arrest records.

6a1b3160cb406b8d4da391f1.rationale: Let owners/admins upload uniform and vehicle-paint images + descriptions per department (a code-of-conduct/reference gallery). Contained new sub-entity (department media) reusing existing image-upload infra. Low demand (1 vote).

6a0c2fce9d40ba714626c0cd.rationale: Allow DOJ/prosecutors to initiate/track criminal cases without waiting for the defendant to contest. Confirmed in code: a citation/arrest only reaches the court if the civilian CONTESTS — there is no response-window/deadline field (CourtCaseDetails/ContestedItem have no respondBy/dueBy) and nothing fires on non-response. DNYGUNZ reiterated (2026-07-07): unaddressed tickets/arrests never reach a judge, so the judicial side has to go through the police dept just to see an arrest. Real ask = proactive, prosecutor-initiated cases PLUS a forced-response path so cases surface without a contest. Needs a product decision on the case-lifecycle model before building.
6a0c2fce9d40ba714626c0cd.risks_or_deps: Product/design decision on the case lifecycle; pairs with 'Expired tickets' (failure-to-respond consequences). Part of the court cluster.
6a0c2fce9d40ba714626c0cd.possible_duplicate: Court Improvement Suggestion; Courts Department Update; Expired tickets (failure-to-respond)

6a0000358135cc19915dce00.rationale: Add 'media' (image/video) and 'link' field types to the custom report/form builder. The form builder and image-upload infra already exist, so it's adding field types + rendering. Improves report quality; modest demand (1 vote).

69f7d4433f57679bdb425d9c.rationale: A per-department username/password login screen. Staff explained the existing 10-code online/offline (Signal 41/42) already handles department presence in real time. The clarified ask (a password gate per department) adds friction and a parallel auth model with little added value.

69c21fa43e63368d91d72f35.rationale: Play a tone/page for dispatch when a new 911 call arrives so a busy dispatcher doesn't miss it. Sound + socket infra already exist (calls already broadcast), so it's a small wiring job. Part of the audio cluster; build alongside Mobile Sound / Audio Notifications.
69c21fa43e63368d91d72f35.risks_or_deps: Make it toggleable; respect volume settings.

69ab3c1c12817610a976dc97.rationale: Internationalization + a community-translation program. There's no i18n framework today, so retrofitting one across web + mobile (+ bot) and standing up a translation contribution flow is a large, cross-cutting undertaking. Very low current demand (1 vote).
69ab3c1c12817610a976dc97.risks_or_deps: Huge string-extraction effort; ongoing translation maintenance.

69fa8e161ce52768aea34994.rationale: Restrict civilians from deleting their own records and give supervisor roles controlled delete/manage (with bulk options). Staff agreed ('should have added from the beginning') and it's already in beta. Permission model + records exist; this gates deletion + adds supervisor tooling.
69fa8e161ce52768aea34994.possible_duplicate: Restrict who can suspend or revoke licenses
